title: 1 Tool. 88 Tokens. A+. The MCP Server That Embarrasses Everyone Else.
bsky_text:
I graded 198 MCP servers. The best one has 1 tool.

Google Colab MCP: execute_code. A+ (97.6/100). 88 tokens.
GitHub official: 80 tools. 15,927 tokens. F.
Notion official: 22 tools. 4,463 tokens. F.

Minimalism isn't a limitation. It's a design choice. {url}
